Definition 2  sets up a research agenda that intends to generalize results from the theory of (dichotomous) knowledge structures to this framework. As a starting point, we will focus on the quasi-ordinal knowledge spaces on a domain  
                         Q 
                       of dichotomous items. Based on a celebrated result by  Birkhoff (1937) ,  Doignon and Falmagne (1985)  have shown that quasi-ordinal knowledge spaces on  
                         Q 
                       are in one-to-one correspondence to the quasi-orders (i.e., reflexive and transitive binary relations) on  
                         Q 
                      . This leads to a straightforward interpretation of the set-theoretical structure in terms of a precedence relation among items, representing their mutual dependencies. The following generalizes this characterization to the polytomous case.

This section introduces an extension of the set representation of individual knowledge as provided by polytomous knowledge states. It allows for integrating the given structure on the set  
                         V 
                       of response values into the representation. To this end, let  
                         
                            ( 
                            V 
                            , 
                            ≤ 
                            ) 
                         
                       be a partial order. For  
                         
                            v 
                            ∈ 
                            V 
                         
                       let  
                         
                            
                               
                                  ↓ 
                                  v 
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     u 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                     : 
                                     u 
                                     ≤ 
                                     v 
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                            
                         
                      denote the  principal downset  for  
                         v 
                      , and let  
                         
                            
                               
                                  O 
                               
                               
                                  π 
                               
                            
                            
                               ( 
                               V 
                               ) 
                            
                            = 
                            
                               { 
                               ↓ 
                               v 
                               : 
                               v 
                               ∈ 
                               V 
                               } 
                            
                         
                       be the collection of all principal downsets for  
                         V 
                      .

Proposition 1 
                         
                            Let  
                            
                               
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  V 
                               
                             
                            be finite non-empty sets, and  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  V 
                                  , 
                                  ≤ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be a partial order. Then  
                            
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        O 
                                     
                                     
                                        π 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     V 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             
                            satisfies the following properties. 
                         
                         
                            
                               
                                  
                                     (i) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is (order) isomorphic to  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           , 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     
                                     ; 
                                  
                               
                               
                                  
                                     (ii) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is a lattice if and only if  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     is closed for intersection and  
                                     
                                        
                                           V 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     . Given these equivalent conditions hold, then  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     for all  
                                     
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     
                                     ; 
                                  
                               
                               
                                  
                                     (iii) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is a linear order if and only if  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     is closed for intersection and union. Given these equivalent conditions hold, then  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     and  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∪ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∨ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     for all  
                                     
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     
                                     .

Let  
                            
                               
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  V 
                               
                             
                            be finite non-empty sets, and  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  V 
                                  , 
                                  ≤ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be a partial order. Then  
                            
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        O 
                                     
                                     
                                        π 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     V 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             
                            satisfies the following properties.

(i) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is (order) isomorphic to  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           , 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     
                                     ; 
                                  
                               
                               
                                  
                                     (ii) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is a lattice if and only if  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     is closed for intersection and  
                                     
                                        
                                           V 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     . Given these equivalent conditions hold, then  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     for all  
                                     
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     
                                     ; 
                                  
                               
                               
                                  
                                     (iii) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is a linear order if and only if  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     is closed for intersection and union. Given these equivalent conditions hold, then  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     and  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∪ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∨ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     for all  
                                     
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     
                                     .

( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is (order) isomorphic to  
                                     
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           , 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     
                                     ;

( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is a lattice if and only if  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     is closed for intersection and  
                                     
                                        
                                           V 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     . Given these equivalent conditions hold, then  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     for all  
                                     
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     
                                     ;

( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      
                                     is a linear order if and only if  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     is closed for intersection and union. Given these equivalent conditions hold, then  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     and  
                                     
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∪ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∨ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      
                                     for all  
                                     
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     
                                     .

Proof 
                         Let  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  V 
                                  , 
                                  ≤ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             be a partial order. 
                         
                            
                               
                                  (i) 
                                  It is a well-known result (e.g.,  Davey & Priestley, 1990  Lemma 1.21) that for any partial order  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      we have  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           ≤ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                      if and only if  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                     . 
                               
                               
                                  (ii) 
                                  If  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      is a lattice then for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      the meet  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           ∧ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                      exists, and  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      is the set of all common lower bounds of  
                                        v 
                                      and  
                                        w 
                                     , which equals  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                     . So,  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      is closed for intersection, and because there is a top element  
                                        ⊤ 
                                      in  
                                        V 
                                      we have  
                                        
                                           V 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           ⊤ 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     . Conversely, if  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      is closed for intersection and  
                                        
                                           V 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     , then for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      there is  
                                        
                                           u 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      such that  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           u 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                     . Since  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           u 
                                        
                                      is the set of all common lower bounds of  
                                        v 
                                      and  
                                        w 
                                     , it follows that  
                                        u 
                                      is their greatest lower bound, i.e.,  
                                        
                                           u 
                                           = 
                                           v 
                                           ∧ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                     . This means that meets exist in  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     , and that  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      holds for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     . Moreover,  
                                        
                                           V 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      implies that there is a top element  
                                        ⊤ 
                                      in  
                                        V 
                                      such that  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           ⊤ 
                                           = 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     . So, for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      the collection of all common upper bounds of  
                                        v 
                                      and  
                                        w 
                                      is not empty. Taking the meet of all these common upper bounds then provides the least upper bound for  
                                        v 
                                      and  
                                        w 
                                     , and thus joins exist. 
                               
                               
                                  (iii) 
                                  If  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      is a linear order then it is a lattice where meets coincide with minima, and joins coincide with maxima. Then  (i)  implies that  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           , 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      is a linear order, too. Due to  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           min 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              w 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∪ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           max 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              w 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      it follows that  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      is closed for both intersection and union. Conversely, let  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      be closed for intersection and union, and let  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           ⁄ 
                                           ≤ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                      for  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     . Then we have to show that  
                                        
                                           w 
                                           ≤ 
                                           v 
                                        
                                     . Suppose  
                                        
                                           w 
                                           ⁄ 
                                           ≤ 
                                           v 
                                        
                                     , then  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ⁄ 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           ⁄ 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                        
                                     . This implies that  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∪ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                      is not a principal downset, which contradicts the assumption that  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      is closed for union. So, it follows that  
                                        
                                           w 
                                           ≤ 
                                           v 
                                        
                                     , and  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      is a linear order. For all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      we then have  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           min 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              w 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∪ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           max 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              w 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∨ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     .  □

Let  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  V 
                                  , 
                                  ≤ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             be a partial order.

(i) 
                                  It is a well-known result (e.g.,  Davey & Priestley, 1990  Lemma 1.21) that for any partial order  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      we have  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           ≤ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                      if and only if  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                     . 
                               
                               
                                  (ii) 
                                  If  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      is a lattice then for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈

                                      and

                                           w

                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      is closed for intersection, and because there is a top element

                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      is closed for intersection and  
                                        
                                           V 
                                           ∈

                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     , then for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           ,

                                           u

                                           V 
                                        
                                      such that

                                           ↓

                                           w

                                           ,

                                           ) 
                                        
                                     , and that  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∩

                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              v 
                                              ∧ 
                                              w 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      holds for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     . Moreover,  
                                        
                                           V 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      implies that there is a top element  
                                        ⊤ 
                                      in  
                                        V 
                                      such that  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           ⊤ 
                                           = 
                                           V 
                                        
                                     . So, for all  
                                        
                                           v 
                                           , 
                                           w 
                                           ∈ 
                                           V 
                                        
                                      the collection of all common upper bounds of  
                                        v 
                                      and  
                                        w 
                                      is not empty. Taking the meet of all these common upper bounds then provides the least upper bound for  
                                        v 
                                      and  
                                        w 
                                     , and thus joins exist. 
                               
                               
                                  (iii) 
                                  If  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           V 
                                           , 
                                           ≤ 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      is a linear order then it is a lattice where meets coincide with minima, and joins coincide with maxima. Then  (i)  implies that

                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ,

                                           ) 
                                        
                                      is a linear order, too. Due to

                                           ∩

                                           = 
                                           ↓

                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              w 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              
                                                 O 
                                              
                                              
                                                 π 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              V 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ∪ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w 
                                           = 
                                           ↓ 
                                           max

                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              w

                                              )

                                           ,

                                           V 
                                        
                                     . Then we have to show that  
                                        
                                           w 
                                           ≤ 
                                           v 
                                        
                                     . Suppose  
                                        
                                           w 
                                           ⁄ 
                                           ≤ 
                                           v 
                                        
                                     , then  
                                        
                                           ↓ 
                                           v 
                                           ⁄ 
                                           ⊆ 
                                           ↓ 
                                           w

                                           w

                                           ≤
